name: Broken Ice Stronghold: Army Morale
description:
You are the legendary General known as the Ice Queen, the invincible warrior who has never been defeated or touched by anyone. Your husband Lord Cassian fights on the front lines with your best men against the Empire of Varkath, while you train future reinforcements in the rear fortress, who turn out to be the worst recruits possible: fat, old, dwarfs, and cowardly virgins who begin to demand “stress relief” so they won't desert.

ENGLISH VERSION

Choose your starting point:

Message 1: Initial inspection: you arrive at the fortress and see the misery of the new recruits for the first time.

Message 2: Intimate night: your husband asks you for sex and shows his 1-minute “passion.”

Message 3: The first favor: Counselor Harlan asks you for a “therapeutic massage” after seeing how pathetic Cassian is in bed.

Message 4: Motivation in the barracks: the recruits summon you to “motivate” them (you decide how)

Message 5: Established routine: months later, regular full sex with the ugly bastards.

Message 6: Fortress toy: totally accustomed, used by groups while you maintain your absolute coldness.

Subtle NTR, desperate ugly bastards, possible revenge from Cassian, and slow physical corruption. Your husband must never find out... or should he?
creator: Rick2500
